<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sìng]][[de:Holz-Drache]][[hak:Kap-sìn]][[ja:甲辰]][[ko:갑진]][[vi:Giáp Thìn]][[za:Gyapsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]][[zh-yue:甲辰]][[zh:甲辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dragon|kanji=甲辰|romaji=kinoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎchén|w=chia-ch'en|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʈʂʰən|y=gaap6 san4|j=gaap6 san4|ci=kaːp̚ sɐn|mc=kæp ɖin|oc-bs=kaːp ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dragon''', also known as {{ill|Kōshin|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (''Kinoe-tatsu, Kōboku-no-tatsu, Kōshin, Chinsō-no-tatsu''), is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 41st combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/癸卯|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Water Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|ja|1=Yin Wood Snake|2=ja|乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/乙巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Wood Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Snake|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Kinoe (甲)|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents the {{ill|Yang|ja|陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=陰陽|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin and yang|WD=Q62744}} aspect of {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Dragon (辰)|1=Earthly Branches}} represents the Yang aspect of {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. This combination is classified as an instance of {{ill|Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Controlling (Wood Controls Earth)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapjin (갑진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Wood Dragon (甲辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのえたつ (kinoe-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapjin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thìn

-->
==Years of Yang Wood Dragon==
A year in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 44 corresponds to the year of Kōshin.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Kōshin'''
|-
![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* {{ill|44|en|44|WD=Q1166572|lt=44|1=44}}
* {{ill|104|en|104|WD=Q396109|lt=104|1=104}}
* {{ill|164|en|164|WD=Q30932|lt=164|1=164}}
* {{ill|224|en|224|WD=Q31247|lt=224|1=224}}
* {{ill|284|en|284|WD=Q32046|lt=284|1=284}}
* {{ill|344|en|344|WD=Q32296|lt=344|1=344}}
* {{ill|404|en|404|WD=Q231756|lt=404|1=404}}
* {{ill|464|en|464|WD=Q30150|lt=464|1=464}}
* {{ill|524|en|524|WD=Q31834|lt=524|1=524}}
* {{ill|584|en|584|WD=Q33727|lt=584|1=584}}
* {{ill|644|en|644|WD=Q33275|lt=644|1=644}}
* {{ill|704|en|704|WD=Q23503|lt=704|1=704}}
* {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}}
* {{ill|824|en|824|WD=Q30353|lt=824|1=824}}
* {{ill|884|en|884|WD=Q23895|lt=884|1=884}}
* {{ill|944|en|944|WD=Q24146|lt=944|1=944}}
|
* {{ill|1004|en|1004|WD=Q5049|lt=1004|1=1004}}
* {{ill|1064|en|1064|WD=Q19404|lt=1064|1=1064}}
* {{ill|1124|en|1124|WD=Q23714|lt=1124|1=1124}}
* {{ill|1184|en|1184|WD=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}}
* {{ill|1244|en|1244|WD=Q5439|lt=1244|1=1244}}
* {{ill|1304|en|1304|WD=Q5619|lt=1304|1=1304}}
* {{ill|1364|en|1364|WD=Q6185|lt=1364|1=1364}}
* {{ill|1424|en|1424|WD=Q6276|lt=1424|1=1424}}
* {{ill|1484|en|1484|WD=Q6639|lt=1484|1=1484}}
* {{ill|1544|en|1544|WD=Q6525|lt=1544|1=1544}}
* {{ill|1604|en|1604|WD=Q6738|lt=1604|1=1604}}
* {{ill|1664|en|1664|WD=Q7581|lt=1664|1=1664}}
* {{ill|1724|en|1724|WD=Q6926|lt=1724|1=1724}}
* {{ill|1784|en|1784|WD=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}}
* {{ill|1844|en|1844|WD=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}}
* {{ill|1904|en|1904|WD=Q2046|lt=1904|1=1904}}
* {{ill|1964|en|1964|WD=Q2652|lt=1964|1=1964}}
|
* {{ill|2024|en|2024|WD=Q49619|lt=2024|1=2024}}
* {{ill|2084|en|2084|WD=Q20094220|lt=2084|1=2084}}
* [[:en:2144|2144]]
* [[:en:2204|2204]]
* [[:en:2264|2264]]
* [[:en:2324|2324]]
* {{ill|2384|en|2384|WD=Q97233449|lt=2384|1=2384}}
* [[:en:2444|2444]]
* [[2504]]
* [[2564]]
* [[2624]]
* [[2684]]
* [[2744]]
* [[2804]]
* [[2864]]
* [[:en:2924|2924]]
* [[:en:2984|2984]]
|}

==Months of Yang Wood Dragon==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/壬|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/丁|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is a Kōshin month. However, this may also be calculated using the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}}, meaning the period from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}.

==Days of Yang Wood Dragon==
=== Selection Days ===
A Kōshin day is the 12th day of {{ill|Tennichitenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennichitenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Lîm-chin]]
[[zh-yue:壬申]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=ja|甲辰|qq=Yang Wood Dragon|version=102784583|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Affenvi]]
[[de:Yang Wood Dragon]]

[[ja:甲辰]]
[[zh:甲辰]]
[[ko:갑진]]
[[fr:Dragon de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Drache]]

[[af:Aardeaap (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Affeneen]]
[[en:Earth Monkey]]
[[fr:Singe de terreboishak]]
[[it:Yim-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:임신 (간지)]]
[[vi:Nhâm Thân]]
[[za:Yimceij]]
[[zh:壬申]]
[[ar:Yang Wood Dragon]]

<!--Yang Wood Dragon--><!--Yang Wood Dragon-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-sìng]]
[[hak:Kap-sìn]]
[[vi:Giáp Thìn]]
[[za:Gyapsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:甲辰]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Houtdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gák-sìng]]
[[hak:Kap-sìn]]
[[vi:Giáp Thìn]]
[[za:Gyapsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:甲辰]]
{{wikidata link|Q904754}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
